title: Founders Associate
key_evidence: CONFIRMED CLOSED. The Ashby posting-api job board for slug 'tilt' returns only 3 live jobs: Lead Product Designer, Finance Manager, Mid/Senior Product Designer. The Founders Associate job ID 0d5fad5b-1fea-4f4f-b0c5-3fd47e282e60 is NOT present on the board => posting removed/filled.
Tilt's official careers page (tilt.app/careers) was independently confirmed to list ONLY those same 3 roles and 'No Founders Associate role is currently open.'

For reference (role as previously posted): Tilt = live-commerce/AI marketplace, founded by ex-Revolut alumni Abhi Thanendran & Neil Shah, 2.3M+ users across Europe; FA was 5-days/week in-person King's Cross, ~£28-48k, working directly with CEO on decks, fundraising, AI automations and shipping code. (The 'shipping code in production' expectation would have been a partial technical stretch for Ryan.)
Because the role is no longer accepting applications, callback_likelihood is set to 0 per instruction.
biggest_risk: Role is no longer live; any application would go unread.
apply_verdict: Do not apply — posting is closed/removed. If interested in Tilt, monitor tilt.app/careers for a re-post or email careers@tilt.app speculatively.
availability: closed (confirmed removed from Ashby board and absent from official careers page)
